channel.title: Knowledge Vault
channel.description: Engineering knowledge from first principles to research-level depth

item.title: 30 System Design Interview Walkthroughs
item.description: Exhaustive walkthroughs for Instagram, Uber, YouTube, WhatsApp, Netflix, Spotify, and 24 more — with estimation math, architecture diagrams, and production code.

item.title: 5 Learning Paths Added
item.description: Guided routes for Backend Engineer, DevOps Engineer, Frontend Engineer, Security Engineer, and System Design Interview Prep.

item.title: 8 Cheat Sheets
item.description: Quick reference cards for Docker, Kubernetes, Git, SQL, TypeScript, Linux, Redis, and Terraform.

item.title: Technology Radar
item.description: 29 technologies categorized by Adopt, Trial, Assess, and Hold — with reasoning for each placement.

item.title: 470+ Pages of Engineering Knowledge
item.description: The Knowledge Vault now contains 470+ deep-dive pages covering system design, architecture, infrastructure, security, DevOps, performance, data engineering, and more.
